image downloader: Downloads an image from a given URL.
video downloader: Downloads a video from a given URL.
audio downloader: Downloads an audio file from a given URL.
text downloader: Downloads the text content from a given URL.
text search: Searches for a specific text or keyword on the internet.
image search: Searches for images on the internet based on a given query.
image search (by image): Performs a similar image search using an input image.
video search: Searches for videos on the internet based on a given query.
text-to-image: Generates an image based on a given text description.
text-to-video: Generates a video based on a given text description.
text-to-audio: Generates an audio file based on a given text description.
image-to-text: Extracts text from an input image using Optical Character Recognition (OCR).
audio-to-text: Transcribes speech from an audio file into text.
video-to-text: Transcribes speech from a video file into text.
audio noise reduction: Reduces background noise or unwanted sounds from a given audio file.
audio effects: Applies various audio effects to a given audio file according to human instruction, such as reverb, chorus, or equalization.
audio splicer: Combines two audio files into a single output file.
voice changer: Modifies the characteristics of a recorded voice according to human instruction, such as tone, pitch, or gender.
text summarizer: Summarizes a given text into a shorter version while retaining the main points.
text translator: Translates a given text from one language to english.
text sentiment analysis: Analyzes the sentiment of a given text, identifying if it is positive, negative, or neutral.
text grammar checker: Checks a given text for grammatical errors and suggests corrections.
text simplifier: Rewrites a given text in a simpler and more understandable manner.
text expander: Expands a given short text into a more detailed and descriptive version.
keyword extractor: Extracts the most important keywords and phrases from a given text.
text paraphraser: Rewrites a given text using different words while maintaining its original meaning.
article spinner: Rewrites a given article using synonyms and syntax changes to create a new, unique version.
topic generator: Generates a list of relevant topics or ideas based on a given input.
audio-to-image: Generates an image that visually represents a given audio, such as a waveform or spectrogram.
image-to-video: Creates a slideshow video using two input images.
video-to-audio: Extracts the audio track from a given video file.
video-to-image: Extracts a still image from a given video.
image stitcher: Stitches together two input images to create a panorama or collage.
image colorizer: Adds color to a black and white input image using deep learning techniques.
image style transfer: Applies the visual style of one image (style) to the content of another image (content) using neural style transfer techniques.
video stabilizer: Stabilizes a shaky input video to produce a smoother output video.
video speed changer: Adjusts the playback speed of a given video according to human instruction, either speeding it up or slowing it down.
video synchronization: Synchronizes the timing of an existing voiceover or audio file with the visuals of a given video.
video voiceover: Adds a voiceover to a given video using a provided script or text.
